title: Ultrawarm Melting Ice
description: Adds configurable ice melting behavior for ultrawarm biomes, like the Nether
body:
# Ultrawarm Melting Ice

A Minecraft Fabric mod that changes the behavior of Ice and Packed Ice to melt in ultrawarm dimensions, like the Nether.

It adds 2 new gamerules:
- `meltIceInNether` :: controls melting of Ice
- `meltPackedIceInNether` :: controls melting of Packed Ice

Blue Ice is unaffected, and there are, currently, no gamerules to change its melting behavior.
